posts.author: Johanna Byas
posts.body: A reminder to the crew: requisitions are for mission-critical equipment. The requisitions board is not a wishlist. Requests will be reviewed on the basis of operational need, and I will be applying that standard generously to myself and sparingly to everyone else. Thank you for your understanding.

posts.author: James Markov
posts.body: Drive's running clean after the recalibration. Whoever tracked down that calibration kit, you have my thanks. She hasn't purred like this since we acquired her.

posts.author: Juliso Ennidos
posts.body: Still no Cobra launcher in requisitions. I remain available to discuss.
